name: Applesauce Fudgies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter together.
2. Mix applesauce, eggs, sugar, and vanilla in a separate bowl.
3. Sift dry ingredients into the applesauce mixture and stir until blended.
4. Add melted chocolate to the mixture and stir well.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square pan and sprinkle with chopped walnuts.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Let cool in the pan on racks.
8. Cut into 2-inch squares.
